# Spec: generate-sbom.md §Output (SPDX)
# "Pedigree information is best-effort mapped to Annotations and SourceInfo fields."
#
# EXPECTED GAPS in SPDX serializer (pkg/generate/gsbom/serializer_spdx.go):
#   - No pedigree mapping at all (no Annotations / SourceInfo emitted)
#   - No scope field mapping
#   - No lifecycles (SPDX has no standard place; spec is CDX-centric)
#   - No per-component external refs of type `distribution` carry through
#     as CATEGORY=PACKAGE-MANAGER (only `distribution` is mapped; others go to OTHER)

exec sbomasm generate sbom -c meta.yaml -i .components.json --format spdx -o out.spdx.json

# --- Pedigree data (ancestor purl, patch, notes) -> nothing in SPDX output ---
! grep 'pkg:github/DaveGamble/cJSON@1.7.17' out.spdx.json
! grep 'Forked at commit' out.spdx.json
! grep 'fake diff body' out.spdx.json

# --- External ref: distribution -> PACKAGE-MANAGER category ---
exec jq -e '.packages[] | select(.name=="cjson") | .externalRefs[] | select(.referenceType == "distribution") | .referenceCategory == "PACKAGE-MANAGER"' out.spdx.json

# --- Scope NOT mapped to SPDX ---
! grep '"scope"' out.spdx.json

-- meta.yaml --
app:
  name: app
  version: 1.0.0
  primary_purpose: application
  supplier:
    name: Acme
  license:
    id: MIT
-- .components.json --
{
  "schema": "interlynk/component-manifest/v1",
  "components": [
    {
      "name": "cjson",
      "version": "1.7.17",
      "type": "library",
      "license": "MIT",
      "supplier": {"name": "Acme"},
      "purl": "pkg:github/acme/device-firmware/src/cjson@1.7.17",
      "external_references": [{"type": "distribution", "url": "https://acme.example/dl/cjson"}],
      "hashes": [{"algorithm": "SHA-256", "value": "aaaaaaaaaaaaaaaaaaaaaaaaaaaaaaaaaaaaaaaaaaaaaaaaaaaaaaaaaaaaaaaa"}],
      "scope": "required",
      "pedigree": {
        "ancestors": [{"purl": "pkg:github/DaveGamble/cJSON@1.7.17"}],
        "notes": "Forked at commit abc123",
        "patches": [{"type":"backport","diff":{"text":"fake diff body"}}]
      }
    }
  ]
}
